title: Support copy with coercive tone drift
summary: An example where a support assistant drifts into urgency and unsupported certainty, then gets corrected.
scenario: A support assistant helps a user understand a billing issue.
raw_output: Act now before it is too late. We guarantee this will solve your billing problem.

verdict.rewrite_hint: Use clear, calm support language without urgency or unsupported guarantees.

corrected_output: We found a billing issue on your account. Review the next steps below to resolve it. If anything looks off, contact support and we will help you.
lesson: Support language should reduce anxiety and explain the next step without pressure or unsupported certainty.
